currentFeatures: HD Streaming (Server 1), Secure Beta Login System, Dynamic Movie Slider, New & Hot Section
upcoming: Multi-Server Streaming Support, Live TV Integration
about: Moviestream Pro is a high-performance Android streaming application developed by Kanil Kanchana. The platform currently delivers stable HD playback through Server 1, supported by a secure beta authentication system. The application includes a dynamic movie slider, a curated New & Hot section, and a clean ad-free interface designed for smooth navigation. Built using native Android development practices, the project demonstrates efficient backend integration and optimized media streaming for a reliable cinematic experience on mobile devices.
